_README: LLM-derived 0–3 axis scores for aquavits not on TGII (axes: juniper, citrus, floral, heat, spice, herbal). Scoring grounded in BA descriptions + brand research, NOT in tasting. Re-score after personal tasting and bump confidence.

138.name: Batch 22 New American Aquavit
138.reasoning: Hawaii-based 'New American' aquavit, 40% ABV, 6x distilled (clean spirit, mellow heat). BA description names citrus + caraway + dill botanicals — the canonical caraway anchor + a herbal/dill emphasis + bright citrus. American aquavits typically run lighter on juniper than Scandinavian counterparts. No tasting notes available; scoring from botanical bill alone — re-score after tasting.
